competitors.name: Cursor
competitors.raw_snapshot: Cursor June 12, 2026: Design Mode improvements—users can click elements, draw on the page, or speak changes by voice to give agents richer context; agent sees selected elements' code, surrounding layout, and visual relationships, can make one element match another, remove repeated content, or adjust groups of components. SDK major upgrades for TypeScript and Python: custom tools via local.customTools (exposed through built-in MCP server called custom-user-tools), JSONL store instead of SQLite (append-only, diffable, versionable), deeply nested subagents—subagents can now spawn their own subagents, and so on, each level keeping its own prompt and model. Run npm install @cursor/sdk or pip install cursor-sdk to upgrade. Source: WebSearch/cursor.com/theagencyjournal.com (来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文)
competitors.content_hash: Cursor June 12, 2026: Design Mode improvements—users can click elements, draw on the page, or speak changes by voice to give agents richer context; agent sees selected el

changes.description: Design Mode 升级：可通过点击/绘图/语音向 agent 提供 UI 上下文，agent 直接看到元素代码、布局和视觉关系
changes.evidence: 「click elements, draw on the page, or speak changes by voice so agents get richer context; Cursor sees the selected elements, their code, the surrounding layout, and the visual relationships on the page」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #2+#3：多模态输入（点击/绘图/语音）描述 UI 意图 → agent 从视觉结构推断变更 = descriptive-first canvas 的更细粒度实现

changes.description: SDK 嵌套 subagents：subagent 可 spawn 自己的 subagent，形成多层 agent 树；自定义工具 + JSONL 可版本化存储
changes.evidence: 「Subagents can now spawn their own subagents, and so on, with each level keeping its own prompt and model」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：嵌套 subagent 树 = 多层 session 图结构在 Cursor SDK 中落地，向 meee2 的 session 图协议逼近

key_findings: SDK 嵌套 subagents 正式支持：agent 可递归 spawn 子 agent，形成任意深度的 session 图——这是 Cursor 最接近 meee2 多 session 图协议的功能
Design Mode 多模态输入：点击/绘图/语音均可作为 agent 的 UI context 来源，descriptive canvas 的交互层进一步丰富

competitors.name: OpenAI / ChatGPT
competitors.raw_snapshot: OpenAI June 12, 2026: Trusted Contact safety feature—users can designate a trusted person to be notified in serious suicide-related safety concerns (personal accounts only, not Enterprise/Business/Edu). Memory capacity doubled for ChatGPT Plus and Pro users with automatic updates to keep context fresher, reduces stale or contradictory saved memories. Workspace Agents free period extended to July 6 before credit-based pricing begins. No new structural agent or session features detected beyond prior cycle (GPT-5.5 Instant, Active Sessions, original memory upgrade already captured). Source: WebSearch/openai.com/help.openai.com (来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文)
competitors.content_hash: OpenAI June 12, 2026: Trusted Contact safety feature—users can designate a trusted person to be notified in serious suicide-related safety concerns (personal accounts on

changes.description: Trusted Contact 安全功能：用户可指定紧急联系人，检测到高风险对话时自动通知联系人
changes.evidence: 「Trusted Contact, an optional safety feature for personal accounts that lets users choose someone they trust to be notified in serious suicide-related safety concerns」

changes.description: ChatGPT 记忆容量翻倍（Plus/Pro），自动更新减少过时/矛盾记忆
changes.evidence: 「twice the memory capacity for Plus and Pro users; automatically updated, reducing stale or contradictory saved memories」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #4：跨 session 记忆持久化容量翻倍，但仍属用户偏好记忆而非 artifact live link

key_findings: 本周 OpenAI 变化属例行迭代：Trusted Contact 安全功能 + 记忆容量翻倍，无新的 agent session 结构性变化
Workspace Agents 免费期延至 7/6，商业化节奏已在上期 baseline 中捕获，进入平稳落地阶段

competitors.name: Windsurf / Devin Desktop
competitors.raw_snapshot: Windsurf → Devin Desktop (rebrand June 2, 2026): ACP (Agent Client Protocol) launched as open-source standard—any compatible agent can run inside any ACP-compatible editor; at launch supports Codex, Claude Agent, OpenCode, and custom in-house agents. Cascade deprecated July 1, replaced by Devin Local (Rust rewrite from scratch, 30% more token efficient, supports subagents). Agent Command Center becomes the primary default interface when Devin Desktop opens—Kanban view of all local and cloud agent sessions. Plans, pricing, settings, extensions, keybindings, MCP connections carry over with no user action. Source: WebSearch/devin.ai/aicoderscope.com/docs.devin.ai (来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文)
competitors.content_hash: Windsurf → Devin Desktop (rebrand June 2, 2026): ACP (Agent Client Protocol) launched as open-source standard—any compatible agent can run inside any ACP-compatible edi

changes.description: ACP (Agent Client Protocol) 开源发布：任意 agent 可通过统一协议接入任意兼容编辑器，跨工具 agent session 协议标准化
changes.evidence: 「open-source protocol that lets any compatible agent run inside any ACP-compatible editor. At launch, Devin Desktop supports Codex, Claude Agent, OpenCode, and any other ACP-compatible agents including agents built by your team in-house」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1+#4：ACP 是跨工具 session 协议的开源标准化尝试——让任意 agent 以统一协议接入任意编辑器，直接与 meee2 的跨工具同构 session 协议理念形成结构性竞争

changes.description: Cascade EOL 7/1，Devin Local（Rust 重写，30% 更高 token 效率，支持 subagents）正式替代
changes.evidence: 「Devin Local replaces Cascade — Cascade deprecated July 1; completely rewritten from scratch in Rust, up to 30% more token efficient and supports modern features like subagents」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：新一代本地 AI 快 session 引擎支持 subagents，多层 session 能力提升

changes.description: Agent Command Center 从「可选面板」升级为 Devin Desktop 开启时的首屏默认视图（Kanban：所有 local + cloud agent session）
changes.evidence: 「Agent Command Center debuted in Windsurf 2.0 as an optional panel showing all local and cloud agent sessions in one place. In Devin Desktop, it is what you see when the app opens」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1+#5：session 管理成为产品第一界面，产品定位明确向「session hub」转型

key_findings: 【关键新威胁 threat_signal=true】ACP 开源协议：Devin Desktop 推出跨工具 agent 接入开源标准，这是与 meee2 session 协议理念最直接的架构层竞争——如果 ACP 被 Cursor/Linear/Notion 等工具采用，meee2 的跨工具 session 协议价值主张需要重新定位
Cascade EOL + Devin Local：整个本地 agent 引擎 Rust 重写（subagents 支持），平台转型完成；Agent Command Center 成为默认界面，session hub 定位落地

competitors.name: Claude.ai / Anthropic
competitors.raw_snapshot: Anthropic June 2026 (post-Fable 5): Managed Agents scheduled deployments (public beta)—attach agents to cron schedule on Claude Platform; each schedule fire starts a new session and completes its task; users can pause, resume, archive, or trigger extra runs on demand. Vault credentials—register credentials for third-party services once, reference by ID at session creation; real key attached at network boundary only, never in agent context (prevents prompt injection key exfiltration). Session webhook events: session.status_idled webhook fires when agent is done OR waiting on tool result; production pattern puts escalation in front of reviewer, POSTs user.custom_tool_result back when human finishes. Claude Code: nested sub-agents, smarter model/region handling, new plugin search, better Chrome/VSCode/terminal workflows. Claude Mythos 5 restricted to cybersecurity/biology partners. Source: WebSearch/claude.com/platform.claude.com (来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文)
competitors.content_hash: Anthropic June 2026 (post-Fable 5): Managed Agents scheduled deployments (public beta)—attach agents to cron schedule on Claude Platform; each schedule fire starts a new

changes.description: Managed Agents cron 定时部署（公测）+ session.status_idled webhook 人工审查 escalation 模式
changes.evidence: 「Scheduled deployments attach agents to a cron schedule on the Claude Platform, and each time the schedule fires, the agent starts a new session and completes its task; the production pattern registers a webhook that fires on session.status_idled... puts any pending escalation in front of a reviewer, and POSTs the user.custom_tool_result back whenever the human finishes」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1+#4：cron 触发的 AI 快 session 自动启动 + 阻塞人工审查的 escalation webhook = Anthropic 平台级实现「人在 agent 图内」的等待/干预卡点，与 meee2 的核心设计高度重叠

changes.description: Vault 凭证系统：跨工具 API 密钥统一注册，session 创建时按需引用，密钥不进入 agent 上下文
changes.evidence: 「Vaults and credentials are authentication primitives that let you register credentials for third-party services once and reference them by ID at session creation; the real key is attached at the network boundary solely on requests to domains the customer allowlists」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #4：session 级跨工具凭证管理，agent 安全访问外部服务的基础设施层

changes.description: Claude Code 嵌套 sub-agents 支持 + 新插件搜索 + Chrome/VSCode/终端工作流改进
changes.evidence: 「Claude Code added nested sub-agents, smarter model and region handling, new plugin search, and better Chrome, VSCode, and terminal workflows」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：Claude Agent SDK 层的多层 session 图结构落地，嵌套 sub-agents 已成跨竞品共识功能

key_findings: 【最高威胁】Managed Agents cron 调度 + session webhook escalation：Anthropic 在平台层实现了「定时 AI 快 session + 人工干预卡点」完整闭环——session.status_idled 的等待/恢复模式与 meee2「人在 agent 图内」的核心设计几乎相同
Vault 凭证 + Claude Code 嵌套 sub-agents：Anthropic 持续完善 agent 执行基础设施，Claude Platform 向全托管 agent 运行时稳步演进

competitors.name: GitHub Copilot
competitors.raw_snapshot: GitHub Copilot June 2026: Cloud sessions—run agent sessions in the cloud directly from the Copilot app. Cloud automations—schedule recurring automations to run in the cloud so work doesn't depend on your machine being awake. Agentic browsing—agent drives the integrated browser (click, type, screenshots) to verify its own UI changes end to end. Voice conversations—on-device speech-to-text in Copilot App, no audio leaves machine. Copilot SDK now generally available—embed Copilot's agentic engine in any app with stable API and production support. Search and query past agent sessions in chat. Copilot CLI: rubber duck GA, voice input GA, prompt scheduling (/every, /after), experimental tabs for issues/PRs/gists. All Copilot plans now bill by AI Credits (June 1). Canvas described as 'bidirectional work surface for humans and agents'. Source: WebSearch/github.blog (来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文)
competitors.content_hash: GitHub Copilot June 2026: Cloud sessions—run agent sessions in the cloud directly from the Copilot app. Cloud automations—schedule recurring automations to run in the clo

changes.description: Cloud Automations：在云端定时调度 AI agent session，不依赖本地机器，CLI 支持 /every、/after 循环触发
changes.evidence: 「Cloud automations: Schedule an automation to run in the cloud, so recurring work doesn't depend on your machine being awake」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1+#5：持久化云端 AI 快 session + 定时触发，不切焦点的后台 session 执行——与 meee2 的 peripheral 菜单栏 + session 后台运行理念高度重叠

changes.description: Agentic browsing：agent 自主驱动集成浏览器（点击/输入/截图）端到端验证 UI 变更
changes.evidence: 「The agent can now drive the integrated browser (e.g., click, type, take screenshots) to verify its own UI changes end to end」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：AI 快 session 自主验证 UI 变更闭环，自主性进一步提升

changes.description: Copilot SDK GA：可将 Copilot agentic engine 嵌入任意应用，stable API + 生产支持
changes.evidence: 「GitHub Copilot SDK is now generally available, allowing you to embed GitHub Copilot's agentic engine into your own applications, services, and developer tools with a stable API and production-ready support」

key_findings: Cloud Automations 上线：Copilot 后台云端 agent session 可定时触发，不依赖本地机器——这是 Copilot 向「常驻 AI 工作 session」演进的关键一步，直接竞争 meee2 peripheral 层
Canvas 定义更新为「bidirectional work surface」：Canvas 不只是展示 artifact，人也可在上面直接编辑——双向可写的 artifact surface 语义升级

competitors.name: Google Gemini / Antigravity
competitors.raw_snapshot: Google Gemini / Antigravity 2.0 (I/O May 2026, missed from prior baseline): Antigravity 2.0 standalone desktop app—no IDE dependency, just parallel agents, scheduled tasks via cron, and subagent workflows running in the background. Live voice transcription using Gemini Audio models. Each interaction creates resumable environment with all files and state intact for multi-turn sessions; Session TTL applies, must build session expiry into long-running workflows. Managed Agents API in Gemini API remains: single API call provisions remote Linux sandbox. Gemini 3.5 Flash GA globally: best model for quick challenging tasks, everyday productivity and multi-step projects. Google AI Studio mobile app announced. Source: WebSearch/techcrunch.com/marktechpost.com/blog.google (来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文；I/O May 2026 内容为 baseline 遗漏补录)
competitors.content_hash: Google Gemini / Antigravity 2.0 (I/O May 2026, missed from prior baseline): Antigravity 2.0 standalone desktop app—no IDE dependency, just parallel agents, scheduled ta

changes.description: Antigravity 2.0 独立桌面 app（baseline 遗漏补录）：无 IDE 依赖，后台并行 agent + cron 定时任务 + subagent 工作流
changes.evidence: 「Antigravity 2.0 is a standalone agent-first desktop app — no IDE, just parallel agents, scheduled tasks, and subagent workflows running in the background」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1+#5：独立 agent 桌面应用，后台并行 AI 快 session + cron 定时触发，不依赖 IDE——与 meee2 的 peripheral 桌面层 + 后台 session 执行高度重叠，此前 baseline 低估了 Antigravity 的威胁程度

changes.description: Managed Agents 可恢复有状态 session（含 Session TTL，多轮对话不重初始化）
changes.evidence: 「Each interaction creates an environment that can be resumed in follow-up calls with all files and state intact, enabling seamless multi-turn sessions without reinitializing context」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1+#4：有状态可恢复 session = 跨工具 artifact 持续访问的基础，但受 TTL 限制，长时序场景仍需额外处理

changes.description: Gemini 3.5 Flash GA 全球推出，Google AI Studio 移动端 app 发布
changes.evidence: 「Gemini 3.5 Flash is Google's best model yet for getting challenging tasks done quickly and efficiently, rolled out to everyone globally」

key_findings: 【Baseline 遗漏补录，建议评估威胁是否升至 crit】Antigravity 2.0 独立桌面 app：Google 在 I/O 发布了无 IDE 依赖的后台 agent 桌面平台，后台并行 agent + cron + subagent + 语音输入，与 meee2 peripheral + session 管理有直接重叠
Managed Agents 有状态 session 可恢复，但受 TTL 限制；Google 已完成「模型 API → agent execution → desktop app → workspace 集成」的完整栈布局

competitors.name: Linear
competitors.raw_snapshot: Linear Coding Sessions (June 11, 2026): Linear Agent can now write code using Claude Code and Codex. Start by assigning issue to Linear Agent, or ask in chat/comment/Slack thread. Each session grounded in workspace context—pulls in issue details, history, customer requests, discussions, and related work. Coding sessions run in secure cloud sandbox, no local dev environment needed. When change is ready, Linear returns new diff for review. Share preview links, bring teammates into discussion, address feedback with further iterations in same thread. 'You can triage, plan, review, and ship—all in Linear.' All workspaces on Basic/Business/Enterprise get $20 × number of users promotional credits. Builds on Code Intelligence (May 14) and MCP support. Source: WebSearch/linear.app (来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文)
competitors.content_hash: Linear Coding Sessions (June 11, 2026): Linear Agent can now write code using Claude Code and Codex. Start by assigning issue to Linear Agent, or ask in chat/comment/Slac

changes.description: Coding Sessions（June 11）：Linear Agent 在云端沙盒用 Claude Code/Codex 写代码，接入完整 workspace context（issue/历史/客户需求/讨论），diff 返回供人审查迭代
changes.evidence: 「Linear Agent can now write code using Claude Code and Codex. You can triage, plan, review, and ship—all in Linear. Each session is grounded in your workspace context, pulling in issue details, history, customer requests, discussions, and related work」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1+#3+#4：人（triage/review/discuss）+ AI 快 session（write code）在同一系统内以 issue 驱动；workspace context（issue+历史+客户需求）作为 descriptive input 驱动 AI session；diff→review→iterate 在同一 thread 完整闭环

key_findings: 【最高威胁 threat_changed=true，建议评估是否升至 crit】Coding Sessions：Linear 一跃成为「人+AI 协同写代码」的完整平台——人做 triage/review，AI 做 coding session，二者在同一 thread 内协作。这是 meee2「人慢 session + AI 快 session，同一系统」迄今最接近的竞品实现
Workspace context 驱动：issue details、history、customer requests 全部进入 AI session context，这是 descriptive-first 的工程实践形态——用结构化工程上下文（而非 canvas）驱动 AI session

competitors.name: Notion AI
competitors.raw_snapshot: Notion AI June 12, 2026: No new releases detected for June 11-12. Developer Platform (CLI, Workers, Custom Agents, Agent Directory) announced May 13, 2026 and covered in prior baseline. Workers pricing begins August 11. Minor API enhancement: bot support for people properties and user rich text mentions in API responses. No structural agent or session changes. Source: WebSearch/notion.com (来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文)
competitors.content_hash: Notion AI June 12, 2026: No new releases detected for June 11-12. Developer Platform (CLI, Workers, Custom Agents, Agent Directory) announced May 13, 2026 and covered in
competitors.no_change_reason: 2026-06-12 未发现 Notion AI 新功能发布；Developer Platform（CLI、Workers 定价）均于 5 月 13 日公告，已在 June 11 baseline 中覆盖；API bot 增强属例行维护，无结构性变化

No new structural agent or session changes beyond March 2026 baseline features (AI-Skills, Desktop Agent, Meeting Intelligence). Source: WebSearch/slack.com (来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文)

competitors.no_change_reason: 本次搜索仅发现 Slack 企业分析仪表板和 Slackbot 读取链接等增量改进，无与 meee2 核心锚点（session、agent protocol、peripheral）相关的结构性新变化

competitors.name: Raycast
competitors.raw_snapshot: Raycast June 2026: No specific new releases for June 11-12. competitors.content_hash: Raycast June 2026: No specific new releases for June 11-12. Recent updates: clipboard history visual settings (link/favicon), improved AI Extension @mentions in root sear

competitors.name: Replit
competitors.raw_snapshot: Replit June 2026: Enterprise self-serve upgrade from any plan without contacting sales (collaborative workspaces auto-move to Enterprise org). Plaid connector—12,000+ financial institutions, team admins configure once, users authenticate own bank accounts via Plaid Link. Shopify store building via Agent—build storefront, add products, set up cart/checkout. Tripo3D in connector catalog—generate 3D models from text/images. Stripe Integrated Payments via Stripe Marketplace. Existing: Microsoft Fabric, SEO Agent, Entri DNS auto-setup. No new agent session or multi-session structural changes. Source: WebSearch/docs.replit.com/blog.replit.com (来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文)
competitors.content_hash: Replit June 2026: Enterprise self-serve upgrade from any plan without contacting sales (collaborative workspaces auto-move to Enterprise org). Plaid connector—12,000+ fina

changes.description: Plaid 连接器：团队管理员配置一次，用户可接入 12,000+ 金融机构构建金融 AI 应用
changes.evidence: 「connect to 12,000+ financial institutions with the Plaid connector, with team admins configuring credentials once while app users authenticate their own bank accounts through Plaid Link」

changes.description: Shopify 一键建店：通过 Agent 构建完整在线商店（产品+购物车+结账）；Enterprise 自助升级
changes.evidence: 「You can now build an online store that sells physical products by asking Agent to build a Shopify store, add products, and set up cart and checkout」

key_findings: Replit 持续向「全栈生产力平台」扩张（Plaid 金融、Shopify 电商、Tripo3D 三维），平台连接器生态快速增长但核心 session 范式无结构变化
Enterprise 自助升级降低了大客户采购摩擦，但产品定位仍是 vibe coding 平台而非 session 协议

competitors.name: Superwhisper
competitors.raw_snapshot: Superwhisper June 2026: Claude Code and Open Code agent support added—voice-control Claude Code from single floating window; when Claude Code completes a task, Superwhisper shows notification so user can respond by voice. Reads screen context and adjusts output for IDE environment (produces well-formed instructions without conversational filler). Types wherever cursor is, no plugins required, interaction ~2 seconds. Also supports Cursor, Codex. New Modes design with dedicated settings view. ElevenLabs Scribe v2 available to all users. Source: WebSearch/superwhisper.com (来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文)
competitors.content_hash: Superwhisper June 2026: Claude Code and Open Code agent support added—voice-control Claude Code from single floating window; when Claude Code completes a task, Superwhisper

changes.description: Claude Code 语音接入：浮动窗口语音控制 Claude Code，任务完成时通知用户通过语音响应
changes.evidence: 「voice-control Claude Code with Superwhisper from a single floating window. When Claude Code completes a task, Superwhisper shows a notification so you can respond by voice」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #5：peripheral 语音浮动窗口接入 AI coding session，「task complete → notify → voice response」循环接近 meee2 的 5 字戳 session 概念，但粒度仍限于语音输入层，威胁等级维持 lo

key_findings: Superwhisper 与 Claude Code 深度集成：成为 voice-to-Claude-Code 的 peripheral 工具，floating window + 完成通知构成轻量版「不切焦点」session 触达，威胁等级维持 lo

competitors.name: Product Hunt AI 新品雷达
competitors.raw_snapshot: Product Hunt AI 新品 June 2026: Wandesk（open-source）——「Build Your Own AI Desktop」，App Workshop（canvas-like）通过描述构建 app，shared context 跨 app 共享，memory 跨 session 持久化，native Claude Code/Codex 集成，全本地无需注册。「Apps live alongside chat, files, tasks, and memory... they live in one workspace with one AI and one shared memory above them.」AGNT.Hub：always-on AI agents 无服务器管理，私有云容器隔离，MCP 集成（Notion/email/calendar），email/calendar agent，audit trail。今日 PH AI 上新趋势：embedding AI into surfaces users already touch（Dune Keypad/Mina/folk/Databox MCP/Typeahead）。Source: WebSearch/wandesk.ai/github.com/producthunt.com (来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文)
competitors.content_hash: Product Hunt AI 新品 June 2026: Wandesk（open-source）——「Build Your Own AI Desktop」，App Workshop（canvas-like）通过描述构建 app，shared context 跨 app 共享，memory 跨 session

changes.description: Wandesk（open-source）：「Build Your Own AI Desktop」——App Workshop 描述构建 app，shared context 跨 app，跨 session memory，native Claude Code/Codex，全本地
changes.evidence: 「Apps live alongside chat, files, tasks, and memory, with AI remembering context across all of them. The apps aren't wired together directly—they live in one workspace with one AI and one shared memory above them, so the AI just reads one app and acts on another」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1+#3+#4：one AI + shared context across apps = 跨工具 artifact pull（F9）；App Workshop = descriptive-first 构建；memory 跨 session；native Claude Code/Codex 集成。命中 workspace/agent/canvas/artifact/session 五个 watch_keywords，建议下次加入 sources.json 持续追踪

changes.description: AGNT.Hub：always-on AI agents 私有云容器，MCP 集成（Notion/email/calendar），每账户隔离，audit trail，无服务器管理
changes.evidence: 「AGNT.Hub gives you a private AI workspace running inside an isolated cloud container... connect your tools through MCP, add skills from the marketplace, and let agents run from the server instead of your machine」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1+#4：always-on AI 快 session 在私有云运行 + MCP 接工具，命中 agent/workspace/session 三个 watch_keywords

key_findings: Wandesk（open-source）：命中 5 个 watch_keywords（workspace/agent/canvas/artifact/session），是迄今 PH 上与 meee2 锚点重叠度最高的新产品，建议下次加入 sources.json 持续追踪
AGNT.Hub：always-on 私有云 agent + MCP，无服务器管理，命中 3 个 watch_keywords；今日 PH 趋势是将 AI 嵌入用户已在使用的表面（peripheral 化），与 meee2 菜单栏路线方向一致

alerts.headline: Linear Coding Sessions（June 11）：PM 工具一跃成为「人+AI 协同写代码」完整平台，最接近 meee2 人慢/AI 快 session 同系统设计
alerts.evidence: 「Linear Agent can now write code using Claude Code and Codex. You can triage, plan, review, and ship—all in Linear. Each session is grounded in your workspace context, pulling in issue details, history, customer requests, discussions, and related work」
alerts.action_suggestion: 立即评估 Linear 是否升至 crit：Coding Sessions 实现了「人 triage/review + AI write code + 同 thread 迭代」完整闭环，与 meee2「人慢 session + AI 快 session，同一协议」的核心定位高度重叠。关键差异：Linear session context 是 issue-driven（结构化工程上下文），meee2 是 descriptive canvas（行为涌现的结构）——这一差异是否足够支撑竞争？建议团队明确 meee2 在 non-engineering 和 cross-owner 场景的差异化叙事

alerts.headline: Managed Agents cron 调度 + session webhook escalation：Anthropic 在平台层实现「人在 agent 图内」的等待/干预卡点
alerts.evidence: 「Scheduled deployments attach agents to a cron schedule; each time the schedule fires, the agent starts a new session and completes its task; production pattern registers a webhook that fires on session.status_idled... puts any pending escalation in front of a reviewer, and POSTs the user.custom_tool_result back whenever the human finishes」
alerts.action_suggestion: Anthropic Managed Agents 的 session.status_idled webhook 模式是「AI 快 session 遇到需要人工决策时暂停等待，人处理后 session 继续」的平台级实现——这与 meee2「人在 agent 图内」的核心设计几乎相同。建议评估：meee2 的差异化能否集中在 (1) 跨工具 live link（非 snapshot）的 artifact 层，(2) descriptive canvas 的 flow emergence 层，而非 session 调度基础设施层（该层 Anthropic 已覆盖）

alerts.headline: ACP（Agent Client Protocol）开源发布：跨工具 agent session 协议的首个开源标准，与 meee2 session 协议理念直接竞争
alerts.evidence: 「open-source protocol that lets any compatible agent run inside any ACP-compatible editor. At launch, Devin Desktop supports Codex, Claude Agent, OpenCode, and any other ACP-compatible agents including agents built by your team in-house」
alerts.action_suggestion: ACP 是竞品对「跨工具 session 协议」这一概念的先发布局。如果 ACP 被 Cursor/Linear/Notion 等主流工具采用，将成为 agent-editor 接入的行业标准，使 meee2 的跨工具 session 协议价值主张失去独特性。建议：(1) 深入研究 ACP 协议设计，评估其是否覆盖 meee2 的 session 同构（人慢/AI 快）概念；(2) 考虑是否参与开源社区或建立差异化的 session 协议标准；(3) 关注 ACP 的 adoption 速度

alerts.headline: Copilot Cloud Automations：定时后台云端 AI session，不依赖本地机器——meee2 peripheral 层的直接竞争
alerts.evidence: 「Cloud automations: Schedule an automation to run in the cloud, so recurring work doesn't depend on your machine being awake」
alerts.action_suggestion: Copilot Cloud Automations 正在实现 meee2 peripheral 层的核心价值之一：「AI session 在后台持续运行，不占用用户注意力」。配合已有的 Canvas + Agent Merge，Copilot 的「后台自主执行 → canvas 可见化 → 人审查」闭环与 meee2 的产品架构高度相似。建议明确：meee2 在 Copilot 体系之外能提供什么额外价值？Copilot 当前仍限于 git 工作流；meee2 的 cross-owner 和 cross-tool 视野是否是关键差异？

alerts.headline: Antigravity 2.0 独立桌面 app（Baseline 遗漏补录）：无 IDE 依赖的后台 agent 平台，cron 触发 + 并行 agents，威胁程度可能接近 crit
alerts.evidence: 「Antigravity 2.0 is a standalone agent-first desktop app — no IDE, just parallel agents, scheduled tasks, and subagent workflows running in the background」
alerts.action_suggestion: 此前 baseline 仅将 Antigravity 记录为 Managed Agents API 的引擎，但其实是独立桌面 app，是 meee2 peripheral 层最直接的竞品之一。建议修订 Gemini/Antigravity 威胁等级评估：Antigravity 2.0 = Google 版本的 meee2 peripheral 层（无 IDE 依赖 + 后台 agent + cron + 语音输入），加上 Gemini 模型能力和 Workspace 集成，整体威胁程度可能接近 crit。建议下次 baseline 升级 Gemini 威胁等级
